tours.itinerarySummary: Cairo → Pyramids of Giza & Sphinx → Egyptian Museum → Saqqara & Memphis

dataQualityNotes.note: Licensed Egyptian tour operator since 1955, confirmed via company terms page. Real cancellation policy (most consistent version found): 15% charge from booking until 61 days before arrival, 35% charge 60-31 days before, 50% charge 30-15 days before, 100% charge 14-1 days before. Different Memphis Tours web pages show slightly different mid-tier percentages (e.g. 25% instead of 35% for the 60-31 day window), so treat the exact mid-tier numbers as approximate; the 15% (far-out) and 100% (last two weeks) tiers were consistent across all sources checked. operatorReviewCount (348) reflects a third-party aggregator's review count at time of search, not Memphis Tours' own published total.

tours.itinerarySummary: Windhoek → Kuidas Camp → Leylandsdrift Camp → Kunene River Camp (fly-in)

communityProjects: Skeleton Coast conservation advocacy (Louw Schoeman legacy)

dataQualityNotes.note: Confirmed via company and partner sources: founded 1977 by conservation pioneer Louw Schoeman, who was instrumental in the 1971 proclamation of Skeleton Coast National Park; now run by his four children (Bertus, André, Leon, Henk). Trips use light aircraft to hop between three small family-run camps (Kuidas, Leylandsdrift/Purros, Kunene), each guided by a Schoeman family member. Group size is capped around 4-8 guests. No public cancellation-fee schedule was located this session, so pricing and cancellation terms remain illustrative placeholders.
